title: Six people observed 2 white balls of light in Curitiba-PR [1992]
excerpt: AUG 4th, 1992. Time: 6:30 pm. Duration: 2 hours. text_preview:
AUG 4th, 1992. Time: 6:30 pm. Duration: 2 hours. In the Pilarzinho region, in Curitiba, State of Paraná, six people observed “two white balls of light”, alternating speed at 200 meters of altitude. According to the witnesses who observed the two UFOs from a distance of 1 km, they were performing circular movements while flying close to each other. The sighting occurred with the sky closed and the naked eye.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.325. “Questionário
summary: Six witnesses in Pilarzinho, Curitiba-PR observed two white balls of light at 200m altitude making circular movements with alternating speed on Aug 4, 1992.
